basics.name: Jiaxun Jiang
basics.summary: M.Sc. student in Geoinformatics Engineering with interests in GIS, remote sensing, spatial data analysis, urban analytics, and AI for geospatial applications.

work.name: Head Office of Changsha Bank
highlights: Participated in data product development in a financial technology context.
Contributed to product-related analysis and practical data application tasks.
Received a full-time conversion offer after the internship.

courses: Graduated with the title of Excellent Graduate
Graduation thesis: Financial Data Analysis and IPO Forecasting for Small and Micro Enterprises

interests.name: Research Interests
keywords: Human activity modeling from spatial-temporal data

references.name: Honors and awards
references.reference: Excellent Graduate; District-level First Prize in Speech Contest; Outstanding Communist Youth League Member; Outstanding Communist Youth League Cadre; Outstanding Student Cadre; Multiple awards in speech and classic reading competitions

references.name: Leadership and service
references.reference: Head of the Outreach Department, Student Union, Nanning Normal University; Secretary of the Youth League Branch, Class 2, Computer Science and Technology, Grade 2020; Group Leader, China-International Fireworks Culture Festival

projects.name: Spatiotemporal Analysis of Nighttime Light Dynamics in Hubei Province
projects.description: Conducted large-scale analysis of nighttime light datasets and built a spatiotemporal workflow to reveal urban activity dynamics and regional inequality patterns.
highlights: Analyzed DMSP-like 1km nighttime light datasets from 2019 to 2023.
Designed preprocessing, normalization, and temporal trend extraction pipeline.
Applied growth rate, variance, and spatial comparison metrics.
Produced maps and temporal curves for visual interpretation.

projects.name: Intelligent Crop Growth Prediction System (Spatial AI Application)
projects.description: Developed a crop prediction pipeline combining remote sensing, GPS, and environmental data for spatial AI modeling.
highlights: Performed multi-source spatial data fusion and feature extraction.
Built machine learning models for crop growth prediction.
Completed end-to-end workflow from preprocessing to evaluation.
Gained deployment experience on real-world geospatial datasets.

projects.name: Financial Data Analysis and IPO Forecasting for Small and Micro Enterprises
projects.description: Built predictive models on enterprise financial data to estimate IPO likelihood and improve robustness across methods.
highlights: Conducted feature engineering and statistical analysis.
Evaluated with metrics such as accuracy and precision.

projects.name: Yoga Website UI/UX Design Project
projects.description: Designed a yoga website prototype and interaction flows in Figma.
highlights: Developed interaction scenarios and prototype behavior.
